summary: Auto-inject EXCHANGERATE_API_KEY from config into the URL path for every spec-derived command; remove the user-facing <api_key> positional.
reason: ExchangeRate-API embeds the credential as a path segment (/v6/{key}/...), which the internal spec format does not natively support. The generator rendered <api_key> as a positional argument; that pushes secret handling onto the agent on every invocation. Patched each spec-derived RunE to read c.Config.ExchangerateApiKey and shift positional indices accordingly.
validated_outcome: Live calls succeed for all spec-derived commands without typing the key (rates pair USD EUR, codes, quota, etc.); shipcheck 6/6 PASS; doctor reports auth source as env:EXCHANGERATE_API_KEY.
